name: AdGen Day 4 — Abyssale Primary + AI Image Gen

criteria.statement: pipeline.py calls generate_image.py for hero image before rendering
DALL-E provider generates a real PNG hero image from a text prompt
Gemini provider generates a real PNG hero image from a text prompt
Generated hero image is uploaded to Telnyx Storage with a public URL
pipeline.py fetches Abyssale template details to discover element names
Brief fields are mapped to Abyssale template elements automatically
Abyssale generate-multi-format API is called with hero URL and copy
Abyssale-generated images are downloaded to local output directory
Each downloaded asset has a metadata sidecar JSON
Pillow render.py is fallback only, not primary renderer
pipeline.py is under 300 lines
All secrets read from ~/.secrets/ at runtime, never hardcoded
Structured logging with timestamps in all scripts
abyssale_export.py auto-discovers template elements via API
SOUL.md documents image generation and Abyssale-primary rendering
TOOLS.md documents new pipeline flow
E2E test: brief → DALL-E hero → Abyssale render → downloaded PNG
Output PNG is professional quality (not Pillow rectangles)
No faces or real people generated in any image prompts
Pipeline exits 0 on success, 1 on failure
